opportunities.title: Immigrant Legal Services – Removal Defense Program
opportunities.summary: Seeking qualified legal service providers to deliver removal defense representation and immigration court preparation for low-income NYC residents. MWBE participation strongly encouraged. Scope includes individual hearings, appeals, and community know-your-rights programming.

opportunities.title: Special Immigrant Juvenile Status (SIJS) Legal Representation
opportunities.summary: ACS seeks legal providers to represent children in family court proceedings where SIJS findings are sought. Work includes intake, family court representation, USCIS petition preparation, and case management coordination with ACS caseworkers.
certifications_required: Law firm or legal services org

opportunities.title: New Americans Opportunity Center – Legal Services Component
opportunities.summary: Statewide RFP to operate an Opportunity Center providing direct legal services including naturalization, DACA renewals, asylum applications, and general immigration consultations. Applicants must demonstrate bilingual capacity and community ties.

opportunities.title: Agricultural Worker Legal Assistance Program
opportunities.agency: Suffolk County Dept of Social Services
opportunities.summary: Suffolk DSS seeks legal service providers to serve agricultural workers in the eastern county, including H-2A visa holders, undocumented workers, and TPS holders facing employer violations, housing insecurity, and removal proceedings.

opportunities.title: Public Benefits Navigation and Legal Screening Services
opportunities.summary: HRA seeks organizations to provide integrated public benefits navigation and legal screening at HRA centers, with a focus on immigrants facing Medicaid, SNAP, and cash assistance eligibility questions linked to immigration status.

opportunities.title: Crime Victim Services – Immigration Relief Components
opportunities.agency: NYS Division of Criminal Justice Services
opportunities.summary: DCJS RFP for victim services organizations to provide U visa and T visa certification support, VAWA self-petition assistance, and crime victim legal representation.

opportunities.title: Community-Based Immigrant Support Services
opportunities.agency: Nassau County Office of Human Services
opportunities.summary: Nassau OHS RFP for wraparound services to immigrant families including case management, benefits navigation, and legal referral coordination. Legal services component is secondary to social services but could be expanded in scope negotiation.

opportunities.title: Language Access and Family Engagement Services
opportunities.summary: DOE seeks organizations to provide multilingual family engagement and language access services across 10 districts. Legal services not explicitly included but scope allows for know-your-rights and SIJS referral components.
